visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a wide shot inside a Costco warehouse. A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a blue and white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in an aisle filled with orange industrial shelving. She is gesturing towards two Thermos flasks displayed on a lower shelf. Behind her, boxes of Thermos products are neatly stacked. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a large warehouse store. (2) The scene transitions to a closer shot of the woman holding the two flasks. One flask is matte black with a dark brown lid, and the other is off-white with a pale green lid and an orange retractable handle. She holds them up for the camera to see clearly, her facial expressions showing excitement and interest. Her hands are actively moving as she discusses the products in a medium shot. (3) A detailed close-up of the off-white flask is shown. The woman demonstrates how the lid unscrews to become a cup and how the inner stopper works. The focus is sharp on the product, showing the texture and the golden THERMOS branding. The background is slightly blurred but still clearly shows the warehouse environment and other shoppers in the distance. (4) The woman demonstrates a unique feature of the flask: a retractable handle. She pulls the orange handle out, then pushes it back until it lies flush against the flask's body. She repeats this action to emphasize the space-saving benefit. Her movements are deliberate and well-framed, showcasing the mechanical design of the item while she looks directly at the camera. (5) The final phase shows the woman standing by the shelf again, holding both flasks near a price card. She gestures toward a price card that reads $1,139. She smiles and makes expressive hand movements, indicating a strong recommendation. The scene concludes with her holding the black flask close to the camera, emphasizing its sleek finish and contrasting color palette.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 天啊 好看. (2) [Variety]: 好看 真好看. [Subtitle]: 好好好. (3) [Subtitle]: 露營控們注意了. [Variety]: 膳魔師保溫瓶. (4) [Subtitle]: 這不用露營控 這你會喝水就可以買了哦. (5) [Subtitle]: 膳魔師新出的保溫杯. [Variety]: 超有質感感的. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個新顏色超好看 這個綠色跟這個咖啡金 都超級無敵好看. (7) [Subtitle]: 它上面的印字啊 是有點燙金的感覺 好 我們近拍看一下. (8) [Subtitle]: 有咖啡黑金 跟這個珍珠白綠色 然後配這個橘邊 兩個都看起來超有質感. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個有1200毫升. [Variety]: 超大容量. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後上面這個轉下來呢 可以直接當杯子以外 旋輕轉就可以出水 瓶口也是蠻大的啊 所以如果你要放一些果料進去也可以 有人會泡水果水啊 這樣都很方便 超級棒的. (11) [Subtitle]: 它保溫可以保到24小時 保冷是6小時 重點是什麼 它的把手. (12) [Subtitle]: 就是為什麼它做這樣子 因為你這樣放在櫃子的時候 你就可以 不佔空間 不然每次那個把手都 超級佔空間 很佔體積 它可以直接這樣子. [Variety]: 不佔空間. (13) [Subtitle]: 我覺得都好看 老實說這是情侶一定要買一組的呢 超級好看超讚的. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個價格呢 一個是 1139 我覺得很值得 因為它很大 而且它是膳魔師 1.2公升才1139 重點是顏色超美 一定要買 這咖啡色真的好帥哦. [Slogan]: 1139.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 distant background shoppers (one male, one female) visible at various points.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a blue and white long-sleeved shirt with puffy white shoulders and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with orange industrial shelving and stacks of boxed products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy female voice speaking Mandarin with an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone and fast delivery. Simultaneously, a bright, upbeat electronic pop background music track begins. The music has a clear, rhythmic beat with a tempo of approximately 120 BPM and major-mode tonality. (2) A distinct mechanical 'click' and 'snap' sound is heard as the woman manipulates the plastic parts of the flask. These sound effects are sharp and have a short spectral duration. The BGM remains consistent in volume, acting as a supportive bed beneath the narration. The speaker's arousal level is high. (3) As she describes the lid's function, there is a soft, friction-based sound of unscrewing plastic followed by a gentle 'thud' as parts are set down. The music continues with a steady pulse, featuring synthesized percussion and light electronic melodies. The ambient store noise is extremely faint. (4) During the demonstration of the retractable handle, multiple rhythmic 'click-clack' sounds are audible, perfectly synchronized with the visual movement of the handle. These sounds are crisp, indicating high-quality sound design for emphasis. The speaker's voice maintains a friendly and persuasive tone with high articulation clarity. (5) The video concludes with the speaker's voice reaching a final peak in intensity as she provides the price and recommendation. The music reaches a natural cadence and fades out quickly. The signal-to-noise ratio is excellent, with the voice and intentional SFX clearly dominating the acoustic landscape throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Color Options -> Feature Demo -> Capacity -> Handle Design -> Price Callout
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and recommend Thermos brand vacuum flasks available at Costco by highlighting their aesthetic appeal, high-quality build, and space-saving retractable handle feature.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator actively demonstrates and praises the product's features while clearly displaying the brand, location, and price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly effective social-media-style product review that uses bright visuals and clear audio design to emphasize product utility.
